prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（含物理类）最低位次依次约 22560→27613→41196→24309→59240，波动较大；2023 年因省控线变化及专业组调整出现大幅后移，2024 年有所回升，2025 年因新高考改革分专业组投档，护理学等冷门组拉低校线至约 59240 名，近 5 年整体呈后移趋势；该校在河南省理科/物理类计划数：2021 年 64 人、2022 年 63 人、2023 年 63 人、2024 年 63 人、2025 年 88 人；2026 年计划大幅增至 113 人，较 2025 年扩招约 28.4%，扩招幅度显著，对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从 2021 年第 103 名持续上升至 2026 年第 63 名，排名提升明显，反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力上升；2026 年声誉评价为偏负面，主要原因系 2025 年录取季在河北、河南等地位次下滑超 500 名，中医学专业在黑龙江、吉林等省份出现断档，最低录取位次跌至二本线，可能对 2026 年报考心理产生滞后影响；抖音热度排名第 103，评价为一般，短视频曝光量处于中等水平；第五轮；该校以中医学、中药学、针灸推拿学为传统优势方向，在中医药领域具有行业标杆地位。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 中医学/临床医学类专业社会热度持续偏热至高热推荐，护理学专业因就业率高也被推荐；河南省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 120 万（含不确定标记），较 2025 年物理类+历史类合计约 90.7 万大幅增加约 32%，考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；2026 年。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次约 59240 名、2026 年大幅扩招约 28.4%（缓解竞争）、学校软科排名持续上升（增强吸引力）、河南省考生规模大幅增加约 32%（加剧竞争）、以及 2025 年断档事件的滞后影响，扩招与考生增加两股力量相互对冲，但学校排名上升和声誉偏负面共同作用使竞争略趋激烈；预测 2026 年最低位次约 68838 名，区间 68338–69338 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for science (including physics category) were approximately 22560, 27613, 41196, 24309, and 59240, showing significant fluctuations; in 2023, due to changes in provincial control lines and adjustments in major groups, there was a substantial backward shift, with a recovery in 2024; in 2025, due to the new college entrance examination reform with major group filing, unpopular groups such as nursing lowered the school line to about 59240, showing an overall backward trend over the past 5 years; the university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Henan Province: 64 in 2021, 63 in 2022, 63 in 2023, 63 in 2024, and 88 in 2025; in 2026, the plan significantly increased to 113, an expansion of about 28.4% compared to 2025, which is significant and helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; the Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has continuously risen from 103rd in 2021 to 63rd in 2026, showing a clear improvement in ranking, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates; in 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to a ranking drop of over 500 places in Hebei and Henan during the 2025 admission season, and a gap in Chinese medicine majors in Heilongjiang and Jilin provinces, with the lowest admission ranking falling to the second-tier line, which may have a lagging effect on 2026 application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 103rd, rated as average, with short video exposure at a medium level; fifth round; the university has traditional strengths in Chinese medicine, Chinese pharmacy, and acupuncture and massage, holding an industry benchmark position in the field of traditional Chinese medicine.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese medicine/clinical medicine majors have consistently high to very high social popularity, while nursing is also recommended due to high employment rates; in 2026, the total number of candidates for the general college entrance examination in Henan Province is about 1.2 million (including uncertain marks), a significant increase of about 32% compared to the combined total of about 907,000 for physics and history categories in 2025, with the expansion of the candidate pool intensifying overall competition; 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 59240, the significant enrollment expansion of about 28.4% in 2026 (alleviating competition), the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking (enhancing attractiveness), the substantial increase of about 32% in the candidate pool in Henan Province (intensifying competition), and the lagging effect of the 2025 gap incident, the expansion and increase in candidates offset each other, but the combined effect of the rising ranking and somewhat negative reputation makes competition slightly more intense; the predicted lowest ranking for 2026 is about 68838, with a range of 68338 to 69338.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 68338–69338, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a reach (requiring rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range), and Tier 3 nursing as a safety option; among Tier 1, the long-term Chinese medicine classes are the most competitive, while among Tier 2, majors such as Chinese pharmacy, pharmaceutical administration, and big data management and application offer good value and can be prioritized.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (including history category) were approximately 2250→1750→2600→1661→2608, fluctuating within the range of 1661–2608. In 2024, it reached the best in recent years (1661st), and in 2025 it rebounded to 2608th, showing a backward trend in the last 2 years. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Henan Province: 5 students each year from 2021 to 2025; in 2026, the plan increases to 7 students, a 40% expansion compared to 2025, which significantly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has continuously risen from 103rd in 2021 to 63rd in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to liberal arts candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to a decline in rankings in Hebei and Henan during the 2025 admission season, and a gap in some provinces for the Traditional Chinese Medicine major, which may have a lagging psychological impact on 2026 applications. Douyin popularity ranking: 103rd, rated as average. Fifth round; the university's Traditional Chinese Medicine discipline holds a benchmark position in the industry, attracting liberal arts candidates to apply for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Traditional Chinese Medicine majors remains consistently high to very high. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Henan Province general college entrance examination is approximately 1.2 million (including uncertain markers), a significant increase of about 32% compared to the combined total of about 907,000 for physics and history categories in 2025, intensifying overall competition. 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of approximately 2608, a 40% enrollment expansion in 2026 (significantly alleviating competition), the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings (enhancing attractiveness), a substantial increase of about 32% in the number of candidates in Henan Province (intensifying competition), and the lagging impact of the 2025 gap incident, the expansion rate (40%) is greater than the candidate growth rate (about 32%), so overall competitive pressure is slightly alleviated. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 3334, with a range of 2834–3834.
